summary: The footage captures a first-person view from inside a vehicle traveling along a road lined with trees and buildings. A bus is seen moving alongside the vehicle, while several cars are parked on the roadside. The driver maneuvers carefully around obstacles such as parked vehicles and pedestrians.

events_timeline.event: A bus travels alongside the vehicle, maintaining a safe distance.
Several cars are parked on the roadside.
Pedestrians can be seen walking on the sidewalk.

uncertainties: Exact positions and movements of pedestrians are unclear due to limited visibility.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions observed.
